# Example CAN dump file (candump format)
# Simulated engine and vehicle data

(1620000000.010000) can0 200#001E000000000000
(1620000000.020000) can0 100#10000A6400C80100
(1620000000.030000) can0 200#003C000000000000
(1620000000.040000) can0 100#20000A6400C80200
(1620000000.050000) can0 300#FF0100000000DEAD
(1620000000.060000) can0 100#30000B6400C80300
(1620000000.070000) can0 200#005A000000000000
(1620000000.080000) can0 100#40000B6400C80400
(1620000000.090000) can0 300#FE0200000000DEAD
(1620000000.100000) can0 100#50000C6400C80500
(1620000000.110000) can0 200#0078000000000000
(1620000000.120000) can0 100#60000C6400C80600
(1620000000.130000) can0 300#FD0300000000DEAD
(1620000000.140000) can0 100#70000D6400C80700
(1620000000.150000) can0 200#0096000000000000
(1620000000.160000) can0 100#80000D6400C80800
(1620000000.170000) can0 300#FC0400000000DEAD
